title: dortmanna lutea var. euphrasioides
intro: Dortmanna lutea var. euphrasioides is a lesser-known variety of the greater celandine plant, a perennial species belonging to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Dortmanna lutea var. euphrasioides include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using them in tincture form to create a liquid extract.
